ops.note: Three consumers wired: cc-review 17d772cd1b0c and cc-present fa46ca4f2522 rewire cmd.Deps/app wiring to cc-interact/procs with their local internal/procs deleted; cc-orchestrate 17bc52f32003 converts from os.Getpid + kill-0 to procs.ClaudePID/LiveClaude (user-elected larger scope).
